passages.passage_text: Directions: Read the following informations and answer the questions that follow it. Six students P, Q, R, S, T, U and V take a series of tests. The following students get the same marks. P always scores more than F. Q always scores more than O. R always scores more than N. Each time either R scores the highest and T gets the least, or alternatively Q scores the highest and U or O scores the least.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If S is ranked sixth and Q is ranked fifth, which of the following can be true?

choices.a: U is ranked first or fourth
choices.b: R is ranked second or third
choices.c: P is ranked second or fifth
choices.d: R is ranked third or fourth
choices.e: T is ranked fourth or fifth

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If V should be ranked not lower than fourth, which of the following must be true?

choices.a: S is ranked second and Q is ranked fifth

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If R is ranked third and T is ranked sixth, which of the following can be true?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If S is ranked second, which of the following can be true?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If V is ranked fifth, which of the following must be true?
